title: 24 Frames
description: Kiarostami’s final film, a series of 24 animated still images exploring the moment before and after a photograph.

title: 8½
description: A famous Italian director struggles with creative block while trying to make a new film.

title: A Day in the Country
description: A brief summer outing unearths bittersweet romance and class tensions.

title: A Man for All Seasons
description: Sir Thomas More weigert de eed van trouw aan de koning te zetten, en draait mee in een politieke intrige vol trouw en verraad.

title: A Matter of Life and Death
description: Een Britse piloot overleeft een neerstortingsongeluk en komt terecht in een surrealistisch rechtszaak in het hiernamaals, terwijl hij vecht voor zijn leven.

title: A Special Day
description: Two lonely neighbors connect in fascist Rome on the day of Hitler's visit to Mussolini.

title: Ace in the Hole
description: A cynical reporter traps a man in a cave-in to exploit the story for his own gain, but the situation spirals out of control.

title: After Hours
description: An ordinary word processor finds himself trapped in a nightmarish adventure in SoHo.

title: Amarcord
description: A nostalgic look back at a quirky Italian town in the 1930s.

title: An Actor's Revenge
description: A Kabuki actor plots revenge against those who wronged his parents in this stylized drama.

title: Andrei Rublev
description: A poetic portrait of a medieval Russian icon painter.

title: Army of Shadows
description: The story of French resistance fighters during WWII struggling to survive.

title: Au Hasard Balthazar
description: The life and suffering of a donkey named Balthazar mirrors the cruelty of the people around him.

title: Autumn Sonata
description: A celebrated pianist visits her estranged daughter, leading to an emotional reckoning over past grievances.

title: Band of Outsiders
description: Three young people plan a robbery and their friendship is tested.

title: Barry Lyndon
description: An aristocratic Irishman tries to climb the social ladder in 18th-century Europe.

title: Beauty And The Beast
description: A visually stunning and poetic retelling of the classic fairy tale about love and transformation.

title: Bicycle Thieves
description: A father and son search post-World War II Rome for a stolen bicycle essential for the father's job.

title: Black Narcissus
description: Een groep nonnen worstelt om een klooster op te richten in de Himalaya, terwijl isolatie en cultuurverschillen hen tot het uiterste drijven.

title: Black Orpheus
description: A retelling of the Orpheus and Eurydice myth set during Carnaval in Rio de Janeiro.

title: Blue Velvet
description: A man investigates a severed ear in a suburban town and uncovers disturbing secrets.

title: Bob le flambeur
description: A seasoned gambler plans one last heist with his young protege.

title: Breathless
description: A young car thief tries to convince his American girlfriend to run away with him to Italy.

title: Brief Encounter
description: A poignant story of a chance meeting and forbidden romance between two married strangers.

title: Chimes at Midnight
description: Shakespeare’s Falstaff as a tragic hero in a tale of loyalty and betrayal.

title: Citizen Kane
description: A newspaper magnate’s life is revealed through flashbacks after his death.

title: City Girl
description: A young farmer marries a city girl, and their relationship faces challenges as they adjust to life together on the farm.

title: City Lights
description: The Tramp falls in love with a blind flower girl and tries to help her regain her sight.

title: CloseUp
description: A man impersonates a filmmaker and is taken to court, where he reenacts the real events.

title: Das Cabinet des Dr. Caligari
description: A seminal German Expressionist horror about a hypnotist and his somnambulist assistant committing murders in a small town, now presented in a stunning UHD restoration.

title: Day for Night
description: A film about the trials and tribulations of making a movie.

title: Death in Venice
description: A composer arrives in Venice seeking peace and beauty, but becomes obsessed with a young boy.

title: Die Nibelungen
description: Lang's two‑part silent epic based on Norse legend — beautifully restored with documentary and booklet.

title: Double Indemnity
description: An insurance salesman and a provocative housewife plot to kill her husband for the insurance money.

title: Early Summer
description: A young woman balances family expectations and her own desire for happiness.

title: Eraserhead
description: Lynch’s debut surreal nightmare—a cult classic about paternal anxiety in a dystopian industrial world.

title: Eyes Without a Face
description: A plastic surgeon attempts to restore his daughter’s disfigured face by kidnapping young women.

title: F for Fake
description: A playful meditation on art forgery, authorship, and deception.

title: Foreign Correspondent
description: Een Amerikaanse journalist raakt betrokken bij spionage en oorlogsslachtoffers tijdens zijn verblijf in Europa.

title: Hamlet
description: Olivier's bekroonde vertolking van Shakespeare's tragedie, met een krachtige en ingetogen uitvoering.

title: Harakiri
description: A masterless samurai requests to commit ritual suicide in a lord’s courtyard, uncovering dark truths.

title: Henry V
description: Olivier brengt Shakespeare's koninklijke drama tot leven met een visueel verbluffende vertolking van koning Henry V.

title: House
description: A surreal, psychedelic tale of a schoolgirl and her six friends besieged by supernatural forces in her aunt’s country home.

title: Human Desire
description: A manipulative drifter becomes romantically entangled in a love triangle while working on a railroad during a violent strike.

title: I Clowns
description: A mockumentary by Fellini exploring his lifelong fascination with clowns and the circus—part documentary, part fantasia.

title: I Know Where I’m Going!
description: Een koppige jonge vrouw reist naar de Schotse Hebriden om te trouwen met een rijke heer, maar wordt door stormachtig weer gedwongen haar plannen te heroverwegen.

title: Identification of a Woman
description: A film director's life becomes complicated as he tries to understand the mysterious women in his life.

title: In the Mood for Love
description: Two neighbors develop a deep, unspoken bond after suspecting their spouses of infidelity.

title: Jeanne Dielman
description: An intimate observation of a widow’s daily life unraveling.

title: Jules and Jim
description: Two friends who fall in love with the same woman, leading to a complex love triangle.

title: Kes
description: A young Yorkshire boy finds purpose and escape in training a wild kestrel, forming a bond that helps him cope with a tough home and school life.

title: Kuroneko
description: In this poetic and atmospheric horror fable, set in a village in war-torn medieval Japan, a malevolent spirit has been ripping out the throats of itinerant samurai. When a military hero is sent to dispatch the unseen force, he finds that he must struggle with his own personal demons as well.

title: Kwaidan
description: A visually stunning anthology of Japanese ghost stories based on traditional folklore.

title: L'Argent
description: A powerful drama about the destructive influence of money, based on Tolstoy's story 'The Forged Coupon'.

title: La chienne
description: A man seduced by a femme fatale, spirals into moral decay.

title: La Strada
description: A touching tale of a simple girl sold to a traveling strongman.

title: Late Spring
description: A widowed father resists his daughter's marriage, fearing loneliness after she leaves.

title: Le Samouraï
description: A hitman tries to outsmart both the police and his employers after a murder.

title: Lifeboat
description: Survivors of a torpedoed ship struggle to survive in a lifeboat with a German survivor.

title: Limelight
description: A washed-up comedian helps a young dancer find success while confronting his own fading stardom.

title: M
description: A chilling psychological thriller about a city's hunt for a child murderer, here in a stunning HD restoration.

title: Master of the House
description: A domestic tyrant is taught a lesson in humility in this quiet, compassionate early work by Dreyer.

title: Mean Streets
description: An early Scorsese tale of small-time hoodlums in New York’s Little Italy.

title: Metropolis
description: A dystopian epic about class struggle in a futuristic city. This is the reconstructed 2010 version with 25 lost minutes restored.

title: Michael
description: A famous painter becomes entangled in a love triangle with his young muse and a seductive aristocrat, one of the earliest and most compassionate homoerotic films in cinema history.

title: Mirror
description: A dying poet reflects on his past, blending memories, dreams, and historical events.

title: Modern Times
description: Chaplin’s Tramp struggles to survive in the modern, industrialized world.

title: Mouchette
description: A tragic story of a young girl facing hardship and alienation in rural France.

title: Mulholland Dr.
description: A twisting neo-noir in LA—famous for its dream logic, identity, and haunting atmosphere.

title: Naked
description: A volatile drifter wanders London’s streets, exposing the underbelly of urban life through his encounters.

title: No Country for Old Men
description: A hunter stumbles upon drug money, triggering a violent confrontation.

title: Nosferatu, eine Symphonie des Grauens
description: An unauthorized adaptation of Dracula, telling the story of Count Orlok, a vampire who terrorizes a small town.

title: Notorious
description: Een vrouw wordt gerekruteerd door de Amerikaanse overheid om te infiltreren in een nazi-genootschap in Zuid-Amerika.

title: On the Waterfront
description: A dockworker struggles against corruption after a friend’s death.

title: Onibaba
description: In war-torn Japan, two women struggle to survive by luring men to their deaths in a marsh.

title: Orpheus
description: A surreal modern take on the Orpheus myth, exploring themes of death, love, and poetry.

title: Paths of Glory
description: During World War I, a commanding officer defends three soldiers accused of cowardice.

title: Perfect Days
description: A Tokyo toilet cleaner lives a life of quiet dignity and rhythm, finding joy in the everyday.

title: Persona
description: A nurse and her patient — a mute actress — develop a mysterious, shifting bond in this haunting psychological drama.

title: Pickpocket
description: A young man turns to pickpocketing while struggling with his own moral dilemmas.

title: Purple Noon
description: A suave thriller based on Patricia Highsmith’s novel.

title: Rebecca
description: Een jonge bruid worstelt met de schaduw van de overleden Rebecca op het landgoed van haar nieuwe echtgenoot.

title: Red Desert
description: A woman struggles with her mental health in a bleak industrial landscape.

title: Richard III
description: In deze film brengt Laurence Olivier Shakespeare's meesterwerk tot leven met een visueel verbluffende vertolking van de machtige Richard III.

title: Rocco and His Brothers
description: A struggling family from southern Italy relocates to Milan, facing rivalry, jealousy and tragedy as the brothers vie for success and love.

title: Safety Last!
description: Harold Lloyd performs his most famous stunt — hanging from a clock on a skyscraper — in this classic silent comedy.

title: Samurai Rebellion
description: A samurai resists his lord’s unjust demands, leading to a dramatic clash of honor and loyalty.

title: Sansho the Bailiff
description: A heartrending family saga about slavery and redemption in feudal Japan.

title: Senso
description: In 19th-century Venice, a married countess enters a doomed affair with an Austrian officer during the war of Italian unification.

title: Seven Samurai
description: A classic tale of villagers hiring samurai to protect them from bandits.

title: Solaris
description: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting a mysterious planet to assess the crew's mental state.

title: Spartacus
description: A slave gladiator leads a revolt against the Roman Empire, challenging the might of Rome and its rulers.

title: Stalker
description: A guide leads two clients into a room that grants wishes, but the journey is fraught with peril.

title: Summertime
description: An American spinster finds love and romance during a holiday in Venice.

title: Sunrise: A Song of Two Humans
description: A married farmer’s wife plots to kill him, but he is saved by a city woman who helps him rediscover love.

title: Taste of Cherry
description: A man drives through Tehran searching for someone to bury him after he commits suicide. Winner of the Palme d’Or in 1997.

title: The 39 Steps
description: Een onschuldige man raakt verwikkeld in een spionagecomplot en moet door heel Schotland vluchten om zijn naam te zuiveren.

title: The 400 Blows
description: A classic coming-of-age story about a misunderstood adolescent in Paris.

title: The Ballad of Narayama
description: In a remote mountain village, an elderly woman faces the tradition of being carried to the mountain to die, according to local custom.

title: The Burmese Harp
description: A Japanese soldier deserts his post in Burma near the end of World War II and searches for his comrades’ graves.

title: The Cameraman
description: Buster Keaton stars as a clumsy but determined man who tries to win the heart of a girl by becoming a newsreel cameraman.

title: The Gold Rush
description: The Tramp ventures into the Klondike in search of gold and fortune.

title: The Great Dictator
description: Chaplin’s first true talking picture, satirizing Adolf Hitler and fascism through the story of a Jewish barber.

title: The Immortal Story
description: An aging wealthy merchant sets out to turn a legendary sailor’s tale into reality, manipulating those around him in the process.

title: The Kid
description: Chaplin's iconic silent film about the Tramp who cares for an abandoned child.

title: The Kid Brother
description: Harold Lloyd stars as the underestimated youngest son who must prove himself in his small town.

title: The Killing of a Chinese Bookie
description: A strip club owner is coerced into performing one last mob hit while dealing with his own identity crisis in this cult classic from John Cassavetes.

title: The Last Waltz
description: Martin Scorsese’s electrifying documentation of The Band’s farewell concert, featuring legendary guests like Bob Dylan, Joni Mitchell, Neil Young and more.

title: The Leopard
description: An aging Sicilian prince witnesses the social and political changes during the unification of Italy.

title: The Life of Oharu
description: The tragic downfall of a noblewoman forced into servitude in Edo‑era Japan.

title: The Lost Weekend
description: A writer struggles with alcoholism during a long and harrowing weekend.

title: The Magnificent Ambersons
description: A wealthy family's decline mirrors the rise of industrial America.

title: The Makioka Sisters
description: Four sisters from a wealthy Osaka family navigate social change in pre-war Japan.

title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
description: Een diplomaat ontdekt een moordcomplot tijdens een vakantie in de Alpen en belandt in een race tegen de klok om zijn zoon te redden.

title: The Music Room
description: An aging aristocrat clings to past glory by hosting lavish music recitals, even as his fortune and status fade.

title: The Naked Island
description: A wordless portrait of a couple’s daily struggle to survive on a remote island, told through imagery alone.

title: The Passion of Joan of Arc
description: A haunting depiction of Joan of Arc's trial and execution, renowned for its emotional intensity and visual style.

title: The Red Shoes
description: A ballerina torn between her love and her art in a stunning Technicolor masterpiece.

title: The River
description: A young girl navigates love and loss during a hot summer in colonial India.

title: The Rules of the Game
description: A biting satire on French upper-class society before WWII.

title: The Saphead
description: Buster Keaton stars as the bumbling heir of a wealthy family who unexpectedly must take charge of a financial empire.

title: The Tales of Hoffmann
description: Een romantische fantasie gebaseerd op de opera van Jacques Offenbach, waarin de dichter Hoffmann zijn drie verloren liefdes herbeleeft.

title: Tokyo Story
description: An aging couple visit their grown children in Tokyo, only to be neglected and overlooked.

title: Toni
description: An early work of poetic realism about an Italian immigrant laborer’s doomed love in the south of France.

title: Touch of Evil
description: Een corrupte politiechef en een Mexicaanse agent raken verwikkeld in een duister moordcomplot langs de grens. De set bevat drie cuts (Theatrical, Preview, Reconstruction) in Dolby Vision HDR 4K.

title: Trouble in Paradise
description: Two thieves fall in love while plotting to steal from a wealthy woman in Paris.

title: Ugetsu
description: A haunting ghost story about ambition and marital devotion set in civil‑war Japan.

title: Umberto D.
description: An elderly man struggles to maintain his dignity and home on a meager pension in postwar Rome.

title: Vampyr
description: A traveler finds himself caught in a shadowy web of supernatural terror at a remote village inn.

title: Vivre Sa Vie
description: A Parisian woman descends into prostitution while trying to maintain her dignity.

title: Wild Strawberries
description: An aging professor confronts his past during a road trip, blending dreamlike sequences with poignant memories.

title: Wings of Desire
description: An angel falls in love with a mortal woman and yearns to experience human life in divided Berlin.

title: Woman in the Dunes
description: An entomologist becomes trapped in a sand dune with a mysterious woman, in this haunting allegory of existence and confinement.
